case_title: DIANA GUZMAN VS. ELEAZAR INVESTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUZMAN, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT ELEAZAR INVESTMENTS, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CREPERIE SAINT GERMAIN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
